working_on: Close five Tier-A open issues before the user pivots back to product work: #142 (urgent psycopg hang via path-aware graph-audit skip), #141 (scan_issue_collisions stopword expansion), #125 (start-engine.md thin-pointer rewrite — SKILL parity prerequisite already landed), #140 (mempalace prose Option-B amendment), #80 (CODEOWNERS).
declared_scope: Close GitHub Issues #142, #141, #125, #140, #80 in one session by landing the minimum work each requires plus the GitHub close. Touch: engine/tools/validate.py, engine/tools/scan_issue_collisions.py, .claude/commands/start-engine.md, engine/adr/0091-engine-memory-substrate-sqlite-fts5.md (Consequences amendment), engine/operations/tools-validate-interpretation.md (prose pass), .github/CODEOWNERS (new), engine/STATE.md, engine/ENGINE_LOG.md, engine/session/archive/S-0195.json. phase: NA-issue-closeout-batch
outcome_summary: Closed 5 Tier-A GitHub Issues before user pivots back to product work. #142 (urgent psycopg.wait_c hang): authored path-aware graph-audit skip in validate.py (Direction 3 from Issue analysis) — new _staged_paths_affect_graph() tri-state helper + GRAPH_AFFECTING_PATH_PREFIXES + graph_audit_skipped_no_staged_graph_paths check; 11 new pytests; #142 itself initially blocked by its own bug (validate.py is graph-affecting so audit ran and hung) — used the S-0191 SUPABASE_DB_URL="" workaround to land. #141 (scan_issue_collisions stopword T3-C gate): expanded _STOPWORDS 31→65 with Issue-body-named infra terms + observed-noise additions; one regression-lock pytest; collision warns now dominated by substantive identifiers rather than generic infra words. #125 (start-engine.md thin pointer): rewrote command 95→60 lines mirroring start-routine.md (#123) pattern; SKILL parity prerequisite was already closed at SKILL.md:80 — only the thin-pointer rewrite remained. #140 (mempalace prose Option B): ADR 0091 Consequences gained subsection refining T1-E gate criterion into 3 accepted-residue categories (bibliographic links + historical audit-rubric entries + retired-tool prose with explicit retirement markers); substantive prose pass on tools-validate-interpretation.md updated 5 'as if current' sites to engine_memory equivalents / explicit retirement markers. #80 (CODEOWNERS): authored .github/CODEOWNERS (41 lines) with engine/product partition + critical-infrastructure block, all owners @StarshipSuperjam (solo-dev). Tier-B trigger-gated issues (#22, #24, #79, #82, #83, #84, #85, #115, #117) intentionally stay open as load-bearing activation reminders. #132 (ENGINE_LOG cut) and #133 (persistent-warn buckets) deferred at plan time to dedicated follow-up sessions. Validate clean (12 soft-warns, all baseline; one `adr_consequences_amendment_header` flagged the initial 'Amendment' header shape and was reworded). 5 deliverable commits + eager-claim + close commit = 7 commits total. Approved plan: ~/.claude/plans/i-need-to-close-melodic-wall.md.
